title: Pack of 2 rigid plastic signs 300mm x 200mm x 3mm with rounded corners - Notice Vehicles and contents left at owners risk
features: Clear and Direct Warning: The bold "Notice Vehicles and Contents Left at Owners Risk" message informs vehicle owners of their responsibility, helping to manage liability and reduce risk.
Durable Rigid Plastic Construction: Made from tough 3mm rigid plastic, these signs are built to withstand outdoor elements, ensuring long-lasting visibility and protection in various environments.
Rounded Corners for Safety: The rounded corners provide a safer finish, reducing the risk of injury during installation or handling while giving the sign a professional look.
Perfect for Parking Areas or Gates: Ideal for car parks, driveways or other areas where vehicles are left unattended, these signs clearly communicate the owner's responsibility for their property.
Value Pack of 2 Signs: With two signs included, this pack offers coverage for multiple locations, ensuring you can place signs in high-traffic or critical areas to reinforce the warning.
description: This pack of 2 durable rigid plastic signs features the clear message "Notice Vehicles and Contents Left at Owners Risk," helping to manage liability in parking areas or driveways. Made from tough 3mm plastic with rounded corners for added safety, these signs are designed to withstand outdoor conditions and remain visible over time. Perfect for placing in areas where vehicles are left unattended, these signs effectively communicate responsibility to vehicle owners.
